questions: You mentioned that 80% of your production code ended up being resilience logic rather than core functionality—did that surprise you, and how does that change how you think about building agents?

When Claude hallucinated URLs on Day 4 and confidently assured you that Day 5 would fix everything, what went through your head, and did that experience change how you think about trusting AI outputs?
You built four progressively more complex agents (calculator → web → ServiceNow → research), but which one taught you the most about how Claude actually decides what to do, and why?
